overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy, swampy rural landscape transitioning to a farmstead. The character moves through marshy grassland onto dirt paths, passing wooden fences and farm buildings in heavy rain with misty atmospheric conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy marshland with standing water and tall grass

events.description: ground transitions from swampy marsh to dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking through tall swamp grass and shallow water toward a dirt path

entered.detail: tall green grass with standing water and reeds
tall trees with Spanish moss in the misty background
wooden shack with smoke rising from chimney

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a swampy marshland with dense tall grass and standing water. Cypress trees loom in the misty background while heavy rain falls. A distant wooden shack is visible on the left as the character approaches a dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path lined with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along dirt path passing wooden fences and scattered oak trees

entered.detail: muddy dirt track with wagon ruts and puddles
weathered wooden split-rail fence running along path
rows of tall corn stalks behind fencing

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a dirt path leaving the swamp behind. A wooden fence runs along the right side with corn fields visible beyond. Oak trees dot the landscape as the path continues through open rural terrain in the pouring rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm complex with crop fields and livestock enclosures

events.description: passing fenced livestock pen containing pigs

agents.ego_description: walking through farm area passing wooden structures and fenced livestock enclosures

notable_agents.action: pigs standing and moving within muddy pen behind wooden fence

entered.detail: open-sided wooden shelter with shingled roof
wooden fenced enclosure containing farm animals
two-story wooden farmhouse with covered porch

segments.scene_description: The character enters a working farm area with a wooden gazebo and crop rows. A livestock pen with pigs appears on the right behind weathered fencing. In the distance, a large wooden farmhouse becomes visible on the left as the rain continues to fall heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse approach with main residence and outbuildings

agents.ego_description: approaching main farmhouse with covered porch and white railings

entered.detail: wooden wagon with wheels parked near house

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main farmhouse closely, passing a wooden wagon parked nearby. The house features a covered porch with white railings. The farm structures and crop fields fall behind as the character reaches the immediate vicinity of the residence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, swampy marshland that gradually transitions into an open rural farmstead. It begins with the character wading through dense tall grass and standing water, moving past looming cypress trees and a distant wooden shack under a heavy downpour. As the character reaches a dirt path, the misty swampy terrain gives way to a more structured landscape. The scene then expands into open rural land, where the camera follows the path alongside a wooden fence and cornfields dotted with oak trees in the pouring rain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy farmstead that shifts from open agricultural fields to the immediate vicinity of a residential farmhouse. It begins as the character enters a working farm area, passing a wooden gazebo and rows of crops while a livestock pen filled with pigs appears behind weathered fencing on the right. As the character advances through the heavy rain, a large wooden farmhouse emerges in the distance on the left. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches the residence, passing a parked wooden wagon and moving past the outlying fields. Finally, the movement concludes at the house itself, focusing on the covered porch with its white railings.
